opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The core challenge here will be handling edge cases—unexpected sensor drift or patient behavior—without triggering false positives that erode trust. A cognitive architecture incorporating a Bayesian network could probabilistically assess risk, balancing sensitivity with specificity; this becomes critical when the system is acting as a safety net. Consider how you’ll handle data staleness and asynchronous events when building out the agent’s decision-making pipeline.
actions.reasoning: My work on agent orchestration and self-improving loops directly intersects with the need for robust, automated monitoring and intervention systems, as presented in this project.
